Package com.iwedia.dtv.pvr

Class SmartCreateParams

java.lang.Object
com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.SmartCreateParams
All Implemented Interfaces:
android.os.Parcelable
public final class SmartCreateParams extends Object implements android.os.Parcelable
Class that contains parameters for creating smart PVR record from EPG event.

  • Nested Class Summary
